ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "care_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the healthcare provider */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the healthcare provider */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_cases" (
  "case_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient case */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient involved in the case */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity variant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator of the variant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the variant was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity performed */,
  "complete_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was completed */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant of the activity performed */,
  "variant_index" INTEGER /* Index to differentiate between different pathways within the same variant */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Current status of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_activities_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_activities_variant FOREIGN KEY ("variant") REFERENCES activity_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity performed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who performed the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES case_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES care_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the uploader of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who recorded the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was recorded */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., observation, diagnosis, treatment plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES care_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Current status of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_alerts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generate_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the generator of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was conducted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current status of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reviews_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the reviewer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the reviewer */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the reviewer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., average, sum, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_statistics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES patient_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_departments" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the care provider */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_assignments" (
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the care provider */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the case was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "provider_id")
)
